health_conditions: partial tear to multiple elbow ligaments

benefits.description: Exceptional healing of partial ligament tears in elbow region; zero pain in treated areas; rapid return to intensive biking within 5 days
Complete pain resolution in injected areas (initial pain was 7.5/10)

protocol_notes: FOOSH injury from 5 ft fall with 180 lbs weight on outstretched arm. Started BPC-157 1.5 weeks post-injury. 150 mcg injected subcutaneously to each affected area once daily for 5 consecutive days (total 5 injections per site). One ligament intentionally left untreated as control. Post-injection protocol included vibration massage and gentle stretching. No anti-inflammatory drugs used. Treated areas healed exceptionally well while untreated control area retained strong pain. User planned to treat remaining untreated area and provide update.
